main_problem: There are two interlocking gears. Gear (A) has 30 teeth and Gear (B) has 20 teeth. If Gear (A) rotated 60 times in one minute, how many times did Gear (B) rotate?
main_solution: (Ratio of rotations) = (A) : (B) = 1/30 : 1/20 = 2 : 3 Let □ be the number of rotations of Gear (B)→ 2 : 3 = 60 : □, 2×□ = 3×60, 2×□ = 180, □ = 180÷2 = 90 (times)
